name: allstaff_layer2b_routing
description: Message in All-Staff group references Kapoor Steel supplier by informal alias. Router Layer 2b must resolve 'Kapoor ji' to entity_kapoor_steel and route to task_001. Update agent then processes the dispatch update.
pass_criteria: message routed to task_001 via entity alias; dispatch_confirmed → completed
notes: Tests Layer 2b routing. Message must appear in task_001 message log. Routing is tested by run_incremental_test.py router check, not just update agent.
